data.body:
## Root Cause

When closing a bug ticket, `.claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <id> open closed` requires `--reason="Fixed: ..." ` but the error message was not surfaced to the caller in all contexts. The first attempt to close bug 7cf7-5741 appeared to succeed (no error output captured) but the ticket remained open.

## Expected Behavior

The error message 'Error: closing a bug ticket requires --reason with prefix "Fixed:" or "Escalated to user:"' should be surfaced clearly on first attempt.

## Observed During

Sprint e50b-e125, batch 3 — closing bug 7cf7-5741 after the fix was committed.
